results.coverage: references/routing.md covers manifest.json routing configuration with routerClass, routes, and targets in detail. references/design-patterns.md mentions SplitApp and FlexibleColumnLayout as master/detail patterns (line 27). SKILL.md references routing.md for multi-view apps.
results.gaps: SplitApp is only mentioned as a one-liner in design-patterns.md ('Master/Detail split: SplitApp or FlexibleColumnLayout') with no code example. There is no complete SplitApp XML view template or controller setup showing master-detail navigation with SplitApp. The routing reference covers general routing but not the specific SplitApp pattern with masterPages/detailPages.
results.recommendation: Add a complete SplitApp master-detail code example to references/design-patterns.md or references/routing.md, including the SplitApp XML view structure with masterPages/detailPages and the routing configuration specific to split-view navigation.

results.coverage: references/design-patterns.md has a dedicated 'Form — ColumnLayout' section (line 86+) with complete XML code showing Form, FormContainer, FormElement, and Input controls with i18n labels. SKILL.md's validation checklist explicitly states 'No SimpleForm — only Form + ColumnLayout'. references/i18n-accessibility.md includes validation message patterns (validationRequired, validationEmail). references/security-performance.md covers input validation against XSS.
results.gaps: No explicit valueLiveUpdate example, but form validation patterns are covered across multiple reference files.

results.coverage: references/design-patterns.md has a complete 'Dashboard — KPI Tiles' section (line 131+) with full XML code showing GenericTile, TileContent, and NumericContent controls with proper i18n bindings, value colors, and layout using HBox/VBox. The SKILL.md description explicitly mentions 'dashboard' as a trigger keyword.
results.gaps: None significant — the dashboard tile pattern is well-documented with production-ready code.

improvement_recommendations: Add a complete SplitApp master-detail example to references/design-patterns.md with XML view template showing masterPages/detailPages structure, and the corresponding routing configuration in manifest.json.
Consider adding FlexibleColumnLayout as an alternative master-detail pattern with a code example, since it is the more modern approach recommended by SAP.
